title: The Poisson Family and Its Relationships
description: A visual guide showing the core Poisson distribution and its connections to other key probability distributions in statistics, highlighting derivation paths and use cases.
relationships: Poisson models rare event counts over fixed intervals
Exponential models the waiting time between Poisson events (inter-arrival time)
Gamma is the sum of k Exponential RVs (waiting time for k-th event)
Binomial approximates Poisson for large n & small p (Law of Rare Events)
Normal approximates Poisson for large lambda (Central Limit Theorem)
